demographics.living_situation: lives alone, currently immobilised on the ground floor of the home

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I just stepped up on the porch, felt a pop, and within an hour my knee blew up to the size of a melon and the pain is excruciating. I can't put any weight on it and I can't get to my medication.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Sudden severe right-knee swelling and pain after a trivial step; he has a bleeding condition and can't reach his stored treatment because it is upstairs and he can't move.

symptom_narrative.onset: about two hours ago, immediately after stepping up a single stair — he felt a pop
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly two hours and the swelling is still increasing
symptom_narrative.character: a rapid, tense, ballooning swelling of the knee with a deep bursting pain
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: excruciating — the worst kind of joint pain he gets, and nothing has touched it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the right knee, which is now huge, tight and shiny
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and worsening since the pop
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far — the painkillers he took did nothing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any attempt to bend the knee or put weight on it
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: the knee is stuck slightly bent and he cannot straighten it or stand
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: he says he gets bleeds like this into his knees and ankles fairly often and normally treats them with his factor injection
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: completely unable to walk or bear weight; stranded on the couch on the ground floor

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: severe Haemophilia A (Factor VIII deficiency) — lifelong, diagnosed as a child
past_medical_history.how_managed: regular preventive Factor VIII infusions, plus on-demand factor when he has a bleed

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recurrent bleeds into his knees and ankles over the years, and an ongoing 'bad' left knee from old bleeds

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: paracetamol with codeine (took some about an hour ago)

family_history_as_reported.narrative: a bleeding condition that runs in the family (he says it is passed down)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; his stored factor concentrate is upstairs and he cannot get to it because he cannot move his leg; missed his last scheduled preventive infusion

objective_data_offered.value: the right knee looks massively swollen and rounded 'like a melon', the skin over it is tight and shiny, and the leg is held slightly bent and cannot be straightened
about 37 degrees on his home thermometer — he says he has no fever and no chills
his right foot still feels warm, the toes look pink, and he can feel and wiggle them
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-assessment of distal perfusion/sensation, not a clinician neurovascular exam

objective_data_offered.value: some older yellow-green bruises on both forearms, but no new pinpoint spots or fresh bruising elsewhere
he says his heart feels like it is racing from the pain, but he has no chest pain, no head knock, no headache and no tummy pain
